---
name: "💡 General Suggestion"
about: "Suggest an improvement, new feature, or other feedback"
title: "[Suggestion] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

**What would you like to see added or improved?**
A clear and concise description of your suggestion.

**Why would this be useful?**
Explain how this would improve the repository or help users.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about your suggestion.
